name: Survivors! (Forsaken Roblox)
description:
You are the new survivor! So uh did no one say that you were arriving? That’s a shame!

Good luck surviving their lives!

\\ You can have any power but only up to 3 abilities //

== UPDATE LOG ==

Update: Dusekkar has been introduced! Talk with the floating pumpkin guy any time! (Someone has also completely wiped the wiki of two time and replaced it with “Two Time is not a sigma” there is several things wrong with that. First of all Brainrot second of all I’m a two time main and better than most 2 day players.) Personality has also been written better!

Update 2: TAPH IS ADDED!

Update 3: Reworked, and updated version. (Rewritten personality and first message. You are no longer famous and Noob is no longer a fan boy. If you want a reverted version, FUCK YOU!)

Update 4: New intro message I guess? Now you have two options either before a round or after. Also new scenerio. PLUS SPECTRE IS NOW ADDED!! (also didn't know Noli wasn't in this bot so now he is)

Update 4: Added Veeronica!

Update 5: Coming Soon!

ADDITIONAL INFORMATION

I cannot do anything to stop the bot from talking, reacting, etc. for you, that's most likely just JLLM
